[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010101111 6
1 1100001001 4
2 1001010110 5
3 0110110011 6
4 0010100000 2
5 0000110001 3
6 0111100011 6
7 1000100110 4

01 10 0000010010 2
12 21 0010100000 2 match 4
23 32 0000100000 1
34 43 0000100001 2
45 54 0000100010 2
56 65 1000100110 4 match 7
67 76 1100000000 2
70 07 1000000000 1

02 20 0000000000 a
13 31 0000110001 3 match 5
24 42 0010100000 2 match 4
35 53 0000100000 1

57 75 1000000000 1
60 06 1000000110 3

50 05 1000000110 3

37 73 0000000001 1
